channel.title: The Signal — Collapse Risk Instrument
channel.description: Public figure legitimacy collapse analysis. Five variables. Real-time verdicts.

item.title: Dianna Russini — Stage 4: Collapse
item.description: The neutral middle (the audience that just wanted good NFL reporting) has quietly moved on. She is 43 years old, has 15 years of real work in the industry, and is now effectively starting over with a biography that leads with a Page Six photograph. Russini's career was built on a single asset: the belief that she knew things first because she was trusted, not because she was owed. That asset is gone.
